title: abd's PvP Mod Pack
description: A compilation of PvP Mods and Utility Mods.
body:
# Abd’s PvP Mod Pack

## Overview

**Abd’s PvP Mod Pack** is built for players who enjoy **competitive combat and multiplayer survival**. It combines HUD enhancements, combat utilities, and multiplayer tools with stability and performance mods to deliver a smooth and balanced PvP-focused experience. While not designed for maximum FPS, this pack ensures responsive gameplay and reliability during intense fights.

## Features

### Combat & HUD Improvements

Stay aware of your status and gear during battles:

* **Detail Armor Bar, Simple Armor HUD, Shield Statuses, Durability Tooltip** – Track your armor, shields, and durability.
* **Crosshair Addons, Custom Crosshair Mod** – Personalize your aim for PvP precision.
* **TotemCounter, Status Effect Bars, Health Indicators** – Know exactly when you’re in danger.

### Multiplayer Essentials

Built with SMPs and teams in mind:

* **Simple Voice Chat** – Coordinate with teammates directly in-game.
* **ReplayMod & Motion Capture** – Record, review, and share your best fights.
* **Xaero’s Minimap & Xaero’s World Map** – Never lose your base or allies.
* **Ping Display, Chat Heads, More Chat History, InventoryHUD+** – Better communication and awareness in multiplayer.

### Performance & Stability

Smooth gameplay with proven optimizations:

* **Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, Entity Culling, StutterFix** – Reduce lag, improve memory use, and stabilize FPS.
* **Dynamic FPS & GPU Booster** – Keep performance consistent even on weaker systems.

### Quality of Life & Visuals

Extra polish without breaking vanilla balance:

* **AppleSkin, Crafting Tweaks, Tooltip Fix, RightClickHarvest** – Practical tools for survival.
* **LambDynamicLights, Blur+, Visuality, Presence Footsteps** – Subtle visual and audio enhancements.
* **WorldEdit, Litematica, REI, Polymorph** – Utilities for building and organizing SMP projects.

## Why Choose This Pack?

If you spend most of your time **fighting, surviving, and collaborating on SMPs or PvP servers**, this pack brings everything together in one place. Instead of searching for dozens of mods individually, **Abd’s PvP Mod Pack** provides a tested, stable collection focused on combat, clarity, and multiplayer enjoyment — all while keeping the vanilla feel intact.

**All credit goes to the original creators of the mods included.**
